scenarios.name: First run creates database file and all 12 tables

steps.text: no "vibe-state.db" file exists at the vibe-cli root

the database contains exactly 12 tables: session, features, stage_progress, artifacts, pipeline_lock, pipeline_state, stage_outputs, debate_state, tier_progress, task_results, merge_results, gate_results
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Subsequent run is a no-op on existing database

steps.text: "vibe-state.db" already exists with all 12 tables populated
no tables are dropped or recreated
existing data in all tables is preserved
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Database deleted manually is fully re-initialized

steps.text: "vibe-state.db" was previously used but has been deleted
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Fresh clone with no database file silently re-initializes

steps.text: the repository was freshly cloned with no "vibe-state.db" present
the session table has no active_feature set
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: PSSQLite not installed produces clear error

steps.text: the error message contains "PSSQLite module required. Run: Install-Module PSSQLite"

scenarios.name: Corrupt database fails fast with recovery guidance

steps.text: the error message suggests deleting "vibe-state.db" and restarting
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

steps.text: multiple @integration scenarios have executed in this test suite

all temp .db files in the test temp directory are removed

scenarios.name: Lock-PipelineState rolls back on partial failure across tables

steps.text: the pipeline_lock table write will succeed but the pipeline_state update will fail (simulated)
Lock-PipelineState is called with feature "auth-flow" and PID 12345
Get-PipelineLockState for "auth-flow" shows no active lock
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Two processes detecting the same stale lock — only one succeeds

steps.text: a stale lock exists for "auth-flow" with PID 99999 and crash_count 0
process A and process B both attempt crash recovery for "auth-flow" concurrently
exactly one process successfully acquires the lock
the other process receives a terminating error indicating the lock is already held
Get-PipelineLockState for "auth-flow" shows the winning process's PID
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Crash budget exhaustion refuses auto-resume and preserves state

the error indicates the crash budget is exhausted and manual intervention is required
the stale lock is NOT released
Get-PipelineLockState for "auth-flow" shows crash_count equal to MaxCrashes

scenarios.name: MaxCrashes boundary — first crash at MaxCrashes=1 allows recovery then second is refused

steps.text: a lock is held for feature "auth-flow" with PID 10001 and crash_count 0
subsequent crash recovery for "auth-flow" is refused with crash budget exhausted error

scenarios.name: MaxCrashes configured as 0 is rejected at startup

scenarios.name: Full crash recovery sequence restores all invariants

steps.text: a lock is held for feature "auth-flow" with PID 10001 and crash_count 0
feature "auth-flow" tier 1 has status "passed" with merge status "merged"
feature "auth-flow" tier 2 has status "running" with merge status "merged"
feature "auth-flow" has tasks T1 (pass) and T2 (pass) in tier 2
feature "auth-flow" has debate rounds 1 and 2 for stage 4 with consensus_status "reached"
Get-PipelineLockState for "auth-flow" shows no active lock
Get-MergeResults for "auth-flow" shows tier 1 merge status "merged"
Get-MergeResults for "auth-flow" shows tier 2 merge status "none"
Get-TierTaskResults for "auth-flow" tier 2 returns 2 rows (T1 and T2) with original statuses
Get-DebateHistory for "auth-flow" stage 4 returns 2 rows with original data
the temp .db file is removed in AfterEach teardown

scenarios.name: Max rounds exhausted enforces consensus failure at MaxDebateRound

steps.text: feature "auth-flow" has debate rounds 1 through 5 for stage 4 all with consensus_status "pending"
Update-DebateState is called with feature "auth-flow", stage 4, round 5, consensus_status "failed"

scenarios.name: Premature debate failure before MaxDebateRound is rejected

steps.text: feature "auth-flow" has debate rounds 1 through 3 for stage 4 all with consensus_status "pending"
Update-DebateState is called with feature "auth-flow", stage 4, round 3, consensus_status "failed"
the error indicates consensus can only be set to "failed" at MaxDebateRound (round 5), not round 3

scenarios.name: Advancing debate beyond MaxDebateRound is rejected

steps.text: feature "auth-flow" has debate rounds 1 through 5 for stage 4 all with consensus_status "pending"
Update-DebateState is called with feature "auth-flow", stage 4, round 6, consensus_status "pending", and moderator JSON
the error indicates round 6 exceeds MaxDebateRound (5) — no further rounds allowed
Get-DebateHistory for "auth-flow" stage 4 returns exactly 5 rows

scenarios.name: MaxDebateRound=1 — advancing to round 2 is immediately rejected

steps.text: feature "auth-flow" has debate round 1 for stage 4 with consensus_status "pending"
Update-DebateState is called with feature "auth-flow", stage 4, round 2, consensus_status "pending", and moderator JSON
the error indicates round 2 exceeds MaxDebateRound (1) — no further rounds allowed
Get-DebateHistory for "auth-flow" stage 4 returns exactly 1 row

scenarios.name: MaxDebateRound=1 — consensus reached on the single round

features.name: Pipeline completion transitions feature to terminal success state

scenarios.name: All tiers pass completes stage 7 and then completes the pipeline

the feature status value in pipeline_state is "complete"

the error indicates all 7 stages must be complete before marking the feature complete

steps.text: a lock is held for feature "auth-flow" with PID 12345

scenarios.name: Import module makes all repository functions available

steps.text: the following functions are available: Open-StateDatabase, Close-StateDatabase, Set-ActiveFeature, Get-ActiveFeature, Clear-ActiveFeature, New-Feature, Get-Feature, Get-AllFeatures, Set-StageComplete, Get-LastCompletedStage, Register-Artifact, Get-Artifacts, Lock-PipelineState, Unlock-PipelineState, Get-PipelineLockState, Add-CrashCount, Update-PipelineState, Get-PipelineState, Set-StageOutput, Get-StageOutput, Update-DebateState, Get-DebateState, Get-DebateHistory, Set-TierStatus, Get-TierProgress, Get-AllTierProgress, Set-TaskResult, Get-TaskResult, Get-TierTaskResults, Set-MergeResult, Get-MergeResults, Set-GateResult, Get-GateResult, Get-GateResults
